kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Secure Area
Verify User Is On Secure Page
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: And Success Message Is Displayed
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'And Success Message Is Displayed' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then Success Message Is Displayed
kw.status: No keyword with name 'And Success Message Is Displayed' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then Success Message Is Displayed

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'And Success Message Is Displayed' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then Success Message Is Displayed

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is Logged In With Valid Credentials
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify User Is On Secure Page
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.msg: Location did not contain '/secure' in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
